ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, accessories) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., sports, casual, formal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the product (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., Cotton, Polyester) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the product */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the chart belongs to */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing chart (e.g., Men's Sizing) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of sizing chart (e.g., US, UK, EU, AU) */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sizing chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the sizing chart */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the sizing chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart the entry belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the entry (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the entry (e.g., chest, waist, length) */,
  "conversion" TEXT /* Conversion value for the entry (e.g., US to UK size) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the sizing entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the sizing entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_entries_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory belongs to */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last update date of the stock level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the inventory entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the inventory entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the customer record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the customer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the order item */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
